message:
bd-2vmxf: GenServer call() with reply obligations

Refactors Reply<R> to use TrackedOneshotSender from channel::session,
making "silent reply drop" structurally impossible (obligation token
panics on drop). Adds ReplyOutcome enum for explicit Committed/CallerGone
discrimination, and Reply::abort() for intentional obligation discharge.

Also derives Debug on obligation marker types (SendPermit, AckKind,
LeaseKind, IoOpKind) for ergonomic downstream use.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
